# RizinOS

> RizinOS is a browser-native operating system - a full desktop environment that runs entirely in the browser. No installation, no drivers, no hardware requirements. Just open a tab.

## What it is

RizinOS is a web-based OS shell providing a complete desktop experience: file manager, terminal, app launcher, window management, user accounts, and cloud storage. The environment synchronizes across all devices automatically.

- Category: Web Application / Browser OS / Online Desktop Environment
- Status: Early Access
- Developer: Ileies Blitz (solo)
- License: Proprietary

## Technology

- Frontend: SvelteKit + Bun + WebAssembly (planned for core OS services)
- Backend: Bun runtime + PostgreSQL + WebSockets
- Architecture: Declarative configuration inspired by NixOS
- Auth: Cookie-based sessions + Google OAuth

## Key features

- Full desktop shell in the browser (no install)
- File system with cloud storage (10 GB free)
- Terminal emulator
- App launcher with sandboxed apps
- Cross-device sync
- Works on any device with a modern browser

## Pricing

- Free tier: available at signup
